arts.ttl: Liverpool handed instant Newcastle United Carabao Cup final penalty verdict
arts.sum: Latest Liverpool news an gossip as Gary Neville gives his verdict on the Reds' penalty appeals during th Carabao Cup final against Newcastle

arts.ttl: 'Really special!' | Brilliant Isak finish doubles Newcastle lead
arts.sum: A brilliant Alexander Isak finish doubles Newcastle's lead over Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Ant and Dec jubilantly celebrate Newcastle's opening goal against Liverpool at Wembley... as Dan Burn's header puts their beloved club within touching distance of silverware after 70-year drought
arts.sum: Iconic TV duo Ant McPartlin and Declan Donnelly were in attendance at Wembley to watch Newcastle's EFL Cup final clash with Liverpool on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Liverpool boss Arne Slot leaves Mark Chapman speechless with Carabao Cup Final moment
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot shoulder barged Sky Sports presenter Mark Chapman in a pre-match interview before the Reds' clash with Newcastle in the Carabao Cup final

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher identifies Mo Salah problem in fresh concern for Liverpool boss Arne Slot
arts.sum: Mo Salah is in the middle of a sensational season for Liverpool but ex-Reds star Jamie Carragher believes he could be in line for a tricky end to the season after an injury blow

arts.ttl: Why Liverpool Weren’t Awarded a Penalty vs Newcastle For Kieran Trippier Handball
arts.sum: Liverpool were denied a penalty after a handball from Kieran Trippier in the first half of the League Cup final.

arts.ttl: 'The boy from Blyth!' | Local HERO Burn heads Newcastle in front
arts.sum: Local hero Dan Burn heads Newcastle in front in the Carabao Cup final.

arts.ttl: Inside Howe's 'transformed' Newcastle as they look to end trophy wait
arts.sum: As Newcastle United bid to end their 70-year wait for a domestic trophy, BBC Sport looks at how manager Eddie Howe has helped turn the club around.

arts.ttl: Viewers notice major ITV change for Liverpool vs Newcastle Carabao Cup final
arts.sum: Liverpool are currently taking on Newcastle United in the Carabao Cup final

arts.ttl: Newcastle fans drown out Sky Sports presenters at Liverpool Carabao Cup Final
arts.sum: Newcastle legends Shay Given and Les Ferdinand joined Mark Chapman on punditry duty for ITV and Sky Sports standing on the middle of the pitch ahead of kick-off to analyse the game. Newcastle supporters then drowned out Liverpool's rendition of 'You'll never walk alone' ahead of kick-off.
